name: Caramel Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the chocolate cake mix according to the package directions.
3. Pour 2 cups of the batter into a greased 13 x 9-inch baking pan and bake for 15 minutes.
4. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt caramels, margarine, and sweetened condensed milk together until smooth.
5. Spread the caramel mixture evenly over the cake.
6. Spread any remaining cake batter over the caramel layer.
7. Top with chopped pecans.
8. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 30 to 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool completely before garnishing as desired.
